name: Esplanade Tradition
description: Private courts - play by invitation only

name: FLEX TENNIS on Treasure Coast
description: Come play pickleball at FLEX TENNIS on Treasure Coast in Fort Pierce, FL! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Floresta Elementary School
description:
This is an elementary school.
Will be used only for PE classes.
hours: M-F 8:30-3:00 1501 S.E. Floresta Drive Port St. Lucie, FL 34983 Phone: 772-340-4755 Fax: 772-340-4756 Policies / Privacy / Non-Discrimination Proudly a St. Lucie Public School | Visit the School District Main Website Go to Top X Processing, please wait…

name: Harbour Ridge Yacht & Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Harbour Ridge Yacht & Country Club in Palm City, FL! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Havert L Fenn Center
description: Havert L Fenn Center is a place to play pickleball in Fort Pierce, FL. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, and trainers or lessons.

name: Indian Hills Pickleball
description: The hours of Pickleball are the same as for the Golf Course and Clubhouse.
open_play_schedule: Open PlayCourts 1/2 beginner/intermediate Courts 3/4 advancedCourt 4 challenge if available and organized

name: Jaycee
description: Come play pickleball at Jaycee in Fort Pierce, FL! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Jaycee Park
description: Jaycee Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fort Pierce, FL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Jaycee Parks
description: Come play pickleball at Jaycee Parks in Fort Pierce, FL! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Justin Wilson Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Justin Wilson Memorial Park in Palm City, FL! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Lakewood Park Regional Park
description: Come play pickleball at Lakewood Park Regional Park in Fort Pierce, FL! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Not sure of best times to play.

name: Lincoln Park Academy
description: The eight courts are not open to the public, at least during school hours. But there are two courts several blocks away at Lincoln Park Regional Park that are open to the public.

name: Maravilla Park
description: Come play pickleball at Maravilla Park in Fort Pierce, FL! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to water, restrooms, food, and locker rooms. You can reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Mid-Florida Credit Union Event Center
description: Mid-Florida Credit Union Event Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port St. Lucie, FL. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts cannot be reserved.
open_play_schedule: Event Center may be closed on some Holidays.
fees: Fee required — $3 to play for non-members

name: Pepper Park
description:
There are also two tennis courts adjacently with lights.
No official lights for the pickleball courts.
The Atlantic Ocean is just a few steps away.

name: PGA Village Island Club
description: Owners/ residents only and their guests
fees: Private — Gated Community/ residents and their guests only

name: PGA Village Verano Pickleball Courts
description: This is a private facility, only available to residents and their guests. There are 27 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, water, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, locker rooms, food, and a pro shop or equipment store.
fees: Private — This facility is only available to residents and their guests.

name: Riverland Sports & Racquet Club
description: The Riverland Sports & Racquet Club features 53 oversized 34 x 64 pickleball courts including 8 covered courts.

name: Sandpiper Bay Resort
description: Sandpiper Bay Resort is a place to play pickleball in North River Shores, FL. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Savanna’s Recreation Area Camping
description: Savanna’s Recreation Area Camping is a place to play pickleball in Fort Pierce, FL. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: The Cascades of Saint Lucie West
description: Come play pickleball at The Cascades of Saint Lucie West in Port St. Lucie, FL! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are private.

name: The Legacy Golf and Tennis Club
description: The Legacy Golf and Tennis Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port St. Lucie, FL. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Vitalia At Traditions
description: Vitalia At Traditions is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port St. Lucie, FL. There are 8 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: Whispering Pines Tennis Center
description: Whispering Pines Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port St. Lucie, FL. There are 24 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Winterlakes Park
description: Come play pickleball at Winterlakes Park in Port St. Lucie, FL! There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: As of December 2022, best days to play are Monday, Wednesday, Friday and Saturday mornings 8am to Noon.
